description: A sensor on a machine has detected a vibration level that exceeds the predefined threshold, indicating a potential bearing failure.

nodes.task_description: Receive the real-time sensor alert with the vibration reading.

expected_outcome.expected: The system automatically receives the alert from the condition monitoring sensor.

nodes.task_description: Automatically generate a medium-priority maintenance work order.

expected_outcome.expected: The system creates a new work order to investigate the high vibration.

nodes.task_description: Assign the work order to the technician responsible for that area.

expected_outcome.expected: The work order is automatically assigned to the correct technician's queue.
